content.speaker: The PRESIDENT pro tempore
content.text:
The PRESIDENT pro tempore. Under the previous order, there will now 
be a period for the transaction of morning business for not to exceed 
beyond the hour of 12:30 p.m. with Senators permitted to speak therein 
for not to exceed 5 minutes each.
  Mr. GRASSLEY addressed the Chair.

content.speaker: The PRESIDENT pro tempore
content.text: The PRESIDENT pro tempore. The able Senator from Iowa.

content.speaker: Mr. GRASSLEY
content.text:
Mr. GRASSLEY. Thank you, Mr. President. The Senator from Montana is 
on the floor and he had an interest in what I am going to speak about.
